name: Superstar
author: Christian Freeling (mid-1980s) / AGP port
description: Christian Freeling's connection-scoring game, the 'missing link' between Star and Starweb, played on the same 217-cell star-shaped board with a Havannah flavour. White moves first; players alternately place a stone or pass, and the game ends on two successive passes. Each of your connected chains scores simultaneously as a STAR (edge cells touched minus 2), a SUPERSTAR (5x(sides connected minus 2)), and a LOOP (enclosed territory: 1 per vacant cell, 5 per trapped enemy stone). Highest total wins; a genuine tie is a draw. Black may receive komi.
